title: Cobblemon Buffs
description: A Cobblemon addon that lets your Pokemon grant you buff effects as they grow stronger
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4f1bd0fbf01204ad7ca2fe15d767d99c329babe.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Cobblemon Buffs allow you to benefit from your pokemon's type & level/friendship by bringing "Buffs"


Buffs are effects from vanilla Minecraft, the power of Buffs lie in the "Tier" your Pokemon is, there is 3 tiers: Tier 1, Tier 2 & Tier 3, and ranking up Pokemon's tier depends on its "Power" which is a combination of the Pokemon's level and friendship 

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Each type grants a unique Buff (e.g fire type grants fire resistance temporarily) each Pokemon in your party that has a unique type gives the Buffs

First, when there is a new Aura (Auras are types) via new pokemon/type you will be notified

![aura](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49c51ef8c224e47d8df058e33b3510ccbb5da7c3.gif)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

When you level up a tier, you will also be notified 

![level up](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5c3176f7e9d3fc48da3b8a60fe548387fb8c1cd.gif)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

To view progress & the Buff gui, to do this, press what ever keybind it is to open chat, when you open it, the same panel from the notifications will show up (above the party HUD)

![party](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f590e5faef1c8da01309816f4ac33ab437e211a2_0.webp)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

then press the panel, this will bring up the Buff gui which includes your power progression, your party to go through and the Tier of the pokemon
![overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26b30b668d5c771dae1eb061dc7db38593794ff6.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

with this gui, you can press the "?" button to check what a type provides

![info gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3af97d64254f27fb56d08c0040320e7cb4dc345d.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

As a warning, this mod is in Beta, expect some bugs (although most surface ones are covered), right now it's in a pretty good state, although expect alot of updates, some buffs might be better than others, i plan to balance things out, but want the communities opinion first


----

any modpack developers are more than free to include my mod in their modpacks!
